summary: Iteration 12 - Caricamento Globale Documenti and Consulente Invitation System testing completed. All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified.

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended (inherited from previous iterations)

passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/consulenti/invite - Creates invitation with token and returns invitation_link
✅ GET /api/consulenti/invitations - Returns pending consulente invitations with role=consulente_lavoro
✅ POST /api/consulenti/resend-invite/{id} - Regenerates token and resends invitation
✅ POST /api/auth/complete-registration - Endpoint exists and validates tokens (supports consulente_lavoro)
✅ GET /api/stats - Returns clients_active count (22 active clients)
✅ GET /api/clients - Returns clients with 'stato' field for filtering
✅ GET /api/consulenti - Returns list of registered consulenti
✅ Duplicate invitation for same email correctly rejected
✅ Invitation requires name and email fields (not password)
✅ Frontend: Global Upload Dialog shows 'Destinatario (opzionale)' label
✅ Frontend: Global Upload Dialog shows '22 clienti attivi' in dropdown
✅ Frontend: Global Upload Dialog has drag & drop area with 'Trascina qui il file'
✅ Frontend: Consulenti tab shows 'Inviti in attesa di registrazione' section
✅ Frontend: Invite Consulente form has Name and Email fields only (NO password field)
✅ Frontend: Pending invitations list with 'Reinvia' buttons visible
critical_code_review_comments: GlobalDocumentUpload component uses c.stato === 'attivo' filter correctly after fix from 'status' to 'stato'
SelectItem value='all' used instead of empty string '' to avoid React controlled component warning
Consulente invitation sends email via send_generic_email - delivery depends on Brevo API configuration
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration12_consulenti_global_upload.py - New test file for this iteration
seed_data_creation: Test consulente invitations created with TEST_ prefix during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified: 1) GlobalDocumentUpload shows '22 clienti attivi' correctly (fixed filter from 'status' to 'stato'). 2) Consulente invitation system fully working with POST /api/consulenti/invite, GET /api/consulenti/invitations, and POST /api/consulenti/resend-invite/{id}. 3) Complete-registration endpoint at POST /api/auth/complete-registration supports role=consulente_lavoro from invitation. 4) Invite form requires only name and email (no password - the consulente sets their password during registration). 5) Pending invitations are visible in UI with Reinvia (resend) buttons.

global_document_upload_dialog.description: Dialog shows 'Destinatario (opzionale)', '22 clienti attivi' count, drag&drop area with 'Trascina qui il file' text

consulente_invite_api.description: POST /api/consulenti/invite creates invitation with role=consulente_lavoro and returns invitation_link

consulente_invitations_list_api.description: GET /api/consulenti/invitations returns pending invitations with correct structure

consulente_resend_invite_api.description: POST /api/consulenti/resend-invite/{id} regenerates token and returns new invitation_link

complete_registration_consulente_support.description: POST /api/auth/complete-registration supports role=consulente_lavoro from invitation document

invite_form_no_password.description: ConsulentiManagement invite form requires only name and email fields (password set during registration)

pending_invitations_ui.description: Consulenti tab shows 'Inviti in attesa di registrazione' section with Reinvia buttons

stats_active_clients.description: GET /api/stats returns clients_active=22 and stats card displays correctly
